title: CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CHILDREN AND FAMILY SERVICE CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Child Outpatient services work with children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high need children). 35 S G Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 947-6021 3 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-6021 ext 3 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance, offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lake County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHILDREN AND FAMILY SERVICE
